title: 5. User observability
description: Users Observability — AI Usage Metrics Framework (Adoption, Engagement, Experience & DQ, Productivity, Governance & Risk).

options.content: 1. Infrastructure2. Network3. AI4. Data5. User6. Cost & Usage7. Safety & Security

panels.title: Adoption
panels.description: 6 metrics from Users Observability Metrics.xlsx

panels.title: Active Users (DAU/WAU/MAU)

targets.expr: count(count by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | user_id != "" [24h])))
count(count by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | user_id != "" [7d])))
count(count by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | user_id != "" [30d])))

panels.description:
**Category:** Adoption

**Metric:** Active Users (DAU/WAU/MAU)

**Definition:** Unique users interacting with AI

**Key Data Elements:** User ID, Timestamp

**Best Visual:** Time-series Line Chart

panels.title: Adoption Rate

targets.expr: (count(count by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | user_id != "" [24h]))) / ((sum(max by (department) (max_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap eligible_user_count [1h]))) or on() vector(1)) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Adoption

**Metric:** Adoption Rate

**Definition:** % eligible users using AI

**Key Data Elements:** User ID, Eligible Population

**Best Visual:** Gauge / KPI Card

panels.title: New User Activation Rate

targets.expr: sum(max by (department) (max_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap eligible_user_count [1h])))
sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" [24h])) or vector(0)
sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | is_new_user="true" [24h])) or vector(0)

panels.description:
**Category:** Adoption

**Metric:** New User Activation Rate

**Definition:** First successful AI usage

**Key Data Elements:** User ID, Activation Event

**Best Visual:** Funnel Chart

panels.title: Feature Adoption Rate

targets.expr: sort_desc(topk(10, count by (feature_id) (count by (user_id, feature_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | user_id != "" | feature_id != "" [24h])))))

panels.description:
**Category:** Adoption

**Metric:** Feature Adoption Rate

**Definition:** Usage of specific capability

**Key Data Elements:** Feature ID, User ID

**Best Visual:** Horizontal Bar Chart

panels.title: User Penetration by Department

targets.expr: sort_desc(  count by (department) (count by (user_id, department)     (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | user_id != "" | department != "" [24h])))   / (max by (department) (max_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap eligible_user_count [24h]))      or on(department) vector(1)) * 100)

panels.description:
**Category:** Adoption

**Metric:** User Penetration by Department

**Definition:** Adoption across org units

**Key Data Elements:** Department, User ID

**Best Visual:** Heatmap

panels.title: Returning User Rate

targets.expr: (count(count by (user_id) (sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" [24h])) > 1)) / (count(count by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" [24h]))) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Adoption

**Metric:** Returning User Rate

**Definition:** Users coming back

**Key Data Elements:** User ID, Session Date

**Best Visual:** Cohort Retention Chart

panels.title: Engagement
Sessions per User

targets.expr: sort_desc(topk(20, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" [24h]))))

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Sessions per User

**Definition:** Usage frequency

**Key Data Elements:** Session ID, User ID

**Best Visual:** Histogram

panels.title: Average Session Duration

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap session_time_ms [5m]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Average Session Duration

**Definition:** Time spent using AI

**Key Data Elements:** Session Start/End

**Best Visual:** Trend Line

panels.title: Prompts per Session

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap turn_number [5m]))

quantile_over_time(0.95, {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap turn_number [5m])

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Prompts per Session

**Definition:** Interaction intensity

**Key Data Elements:** Prompt ID, Session ID

**Best Visual:** Box Plot

panels.title: Messages per Conversation

targets.expr: sort_desc(topk(15, max by (session_id) (max_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap message_count [24h]))))

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Messages per Conversation

**Definition:** Conversation depth

**Key Data Elements:** Conversation ID

**Best Visual:** Distribution Histogram

panels.title: Stickiness (DAU/MAU)

targets.expr: (count(count by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | user_id != "" [24h]))) / (count(count by (user_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="login_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | user_id != "" [30d]))) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Stickiness (DAU/MAU)

**Definition:** Repeat engagement

**Key Data Elements:** User ID, Date

**Best Visual:** Gauge + Trend Line

panels.title: Feature Usage Distribution

targets.expr: topk(8, sum by (feature_id) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | feature_id != "" [24h])))

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Feature Usage Distribution

**Definition:** Feature popularity

**Key Data Elements:** Feature ID

**Best Visual:** Treemap

panels.title: Usage by Time of Day

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (hour_of_day) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap hour_of_day [24h])))

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Usage by Time of Day

**Definition:** Peak usage periods

**Key Data Elements:** Timestamp

**Best Visual:** 24-Hour Heatmap

panels.title: Top 10 Users by Token

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap total_tokens [24h])))

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Top 10 Users by Token

**Definition:** Highest token consumers

**Key Data Elements:** User ID, Token Count

**Best Visual:** Ranked Bar Chart

panels.title: Top 10 Users by Session Duration

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap session_time_ms [24h])))

panels.description:
**Category:** Engagement

**Metric:** Top 10 Users by Session Duration

**Definition:** Most engaged users

**Key Data Elements:** User ID, Session Duration

**Best Visual:** Ranked Bar Chart
9 metrics from Users Observability Metrics.xlsx

panels.title: Experience & DQ
Task Completion Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | task_completed="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Task Completion Rate

**Definition:** Tasks successfully completed

**Key Data Elements:** Task Status

**Best Visual:** Gauge

panels.title: Response Acceptance Rate

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | response_accepted="true" [24h]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | response_accepted="false" [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Response Acceptance Rate

**Definition:** Accepted responses

**Key Data Elements:** Response Status

**Best Visual:** Donut Chart

panels.title: Regeneration Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | regeneration="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Regeneration Rate

**Definition:** Retry frequency

**Key Data Elements:** Regeneration Event

**Best Visual:** Trend Line

panels.title: Prompt Abandonment Rate

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1)

sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | prompt_abandoned="true" [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Prompt Abandonment Rate

**Definition:** Prompts not completed

**Key Data Elements:** Prompt Status

**Best Visual:** Funnel Chart

panels.title: Conversation Abandonment Rate

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | conversation_abandoned="false" [24h]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | conversation_abandoned="true" [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Conversation Abandonment Rate

**Definition:** Sessions ending prematurely

**Key Data Elements:** Session Outcome

**Best Visual:** Sankey Diagram

panels.title: Error Encounter Rate

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | status="error" [5m]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | status="success" [5m]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Error Encounter Rate

**Definition:** User-facing failures

**Key Data Elements:** Error Events

**Best Visual:** Stacked Area Chart

panels.title: Average Response Latency

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.95, {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap latency_ms [5m])

quantile_over_time(0.99, {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap latency_ms [5m])

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Average Response Latency

**Definition:** User wait time

**Key Data Elements:** Request Time, Response Time

**Best Visual:** P95/P99 Trend Line

panels.title: Time to First Response

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap first_token_ms [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Time to First Response

**Definition:** Initial response speed

**Key Data Elements:** Prompt Timestamp

**Best Visual:** Latency Distribution Histogram

panels.title: Escalation Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | escalation="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Escalation Rate

**Definition:** Human handoff frequency

**Key Data Elements:** Escalation Event

**Best Visual:** Trend Line

panels.title: Hallucination Feedback Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | hallucination_feedback="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Experience & DQ

**Metric:** Hallucination Feedback Rate

**Definition:** Incorrect answer reports

**Key Data Elements:** Feedback Type

**Best Visual:** Control Chart
10 metrics from Users Observability Metrics.xlsx

panels.title: Productivity and Efficiency
Time Saved per Task

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap time_saved_ms [5m]))

quantile_over_time(0.95, {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap time_saved_ms [5m])

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Time Saved per Task

**Definition:** Efficiency gain

**Key Data Elements:** Task Duration

**Best Visual:** Box Plot

panels.title: Productivity Gain %

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap productivity_gain_pct [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Productivity Gain %

**Definition:** Performance improvement

**Key Data Elements:** Baseline vs Current

**Best Visual:** Bullet Chart

panels.title: Tasks Automated

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | task_automated="true" [1h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Tasks Automated

**Definition:** AI-completed tasks

**Key Data Elements:** Automation Events

**Best Visual:** Cumulative Trend Line

panels.title: AI-Assisted Task Rate

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | ai_assisted="true" [24h]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | ai_assisted="false" [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** AI-Assisted Task Rate

**Definition:** AI usage in workflows

**Key Data Elements:** AI Usage Flag

**Best Visual:** Stacked Bar Chart

panels.title: Resolution Time Reduction

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap baseline_resolution_ms [24h]))

avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap resolution_time_ms [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Resolution Time Reduction

**Definition:** Faster completion

**Key Data Elements:** Resolution Duration

**Best Visual:** Before/After Bar Chart

panels.title: Employee Capacity Created

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap time_saved_ms [5m]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Employee Capacity Created

**Definition:** Time freed up

**Key Data Elements:** Time Saved

**Best Visual:** Area Chart

panels.title: Revenue Influence

targets.expr: sum by (department) (sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap revenue_influence_usd [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Revenue Influence

**Definition:** Revenue attributed to AI

**Key Data Elements:** Revenue Events

**Best Visual:** Waterfall Chart

panels.title: Cost Avoidance

targets.expr: sum by (department) (sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap cost_avoidance_usd [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Cost Avoidance

**Definition:** Savings generated

**Key Data Elements:** Cost Baseline

**Best Visual:** Waterfall Chart

panels.title: Conversion Lift

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unwrap conversion_lift_pct [24h]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Productivity and Efficiency

**Metric:** Conversion Lift

**Definition:** Conversion improvement

**Key Data Elements:** Conversion Events

**Best Visual:** Experiment Lift Chart
9 metrics from Users Observability Metrics.xlsx

panels.title: Governance & Risk
Sensitive Data Exposure Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | sensitive_data_exposure="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Governance & Risk

**Metric:** Sensitive Data Exposure Rate

**Definition:** Restricted content entered

**Key Data Elements:** Classification Results

**Best Visual:** Risk Trend Line

panels.title: PII Submission Rate

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (department) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | pii_submitted="true" [24h])))

panels.description:
**Category:** Governance & Risk

**Metric:** PII Submission Rate

**Definition:** Personal data submissions

**Key Data Elements:** PII Detection

**Best Visual:** Heatmap

panels.title: Policy Violation Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | policy_violation="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Governance & Risk

**Metric:** Policy Violation Rate

**Definition:** Content violations

**Key Data Elements:** Moderation Results

**Best Visual:** Control Chart

panels.title: Unsafe Output Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | unsafe_output="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Governance & Risk

**Metric:** Unsafe Output Rate

**Definition:** Unsafe AI responses

**Key Data Elements:** Safety Flags

**Best Visual:** Trend Line

panels.title: Audit Coverage

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | audit_logged="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100

panels.description:
**Category:** Governance & Risk

**Metric:** Audit Coverage

**Definition:** Logged interactions

**Key Data Elements:** Audit Logs

**Best Visual:** Gauge

panels.title: Access Violation Rate

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | access_violation="true" [5m]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | access_violation="false" [5m]))

panels.description:
**Category:** Governance & Risk

**Metric:** Access Violation Rate

**Definition:** Unauthorized attempts

**Key Data Elements:** Access Logs

**Best Visual:** Stacked Bar Chart

panels.title: Human Review Rate

targets.expr: (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | human_review="true" [24h])) / (sum(count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" [24h])) or vector(1) or on() vector(1))) * 100
